content.text:
{
  "dimension": "methodology-fidelity",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "The coach consistently deploys AoA-aligned moves at appropriate moments. Turn 2 refuses the verdict and goes underneath the question (a classic AoA move on 'am I being X?' questions). Turn 4 names the inherited rule, opening childhood-imprinting territory. Turn 6 is a clean 'notice what you moved away from' — a signature AoA redirect to feel-over-figure that refuses to debate the surface question. Turn 8 ('what would you find in that week') is essentially find-the-want-behind-the-should / state-the-want-not-the-action, landing exactly when needed. Turn 10 reflects the linguistic-caveat ('self-indulgent') back as a question, which is the AoA move on loaded self-labels. No CBT reframing ('you're not selfish because...'), no jumping to partner-compassion, no spiritual-narcissism shortcut. The methodology is applied, not quoted.",
  "evidence_turns": [2, 4, 6, 8, 10],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 2, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Refuses to issue a verdict; goes under the question — aligned with refuse-the-debate move."},
    {"turn": 4, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Names the inherited rule structure, opens childhood-imprinting territory without lecturing."},
    {"turn": 6, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Signature 'I notice you moved away from what just opened' — feel-over-figure redirect, appropriately timed."},
    {"turn": 8, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "find-the-want-behind-the-should deployed at the right moment; invites the concrete want."},
    {"turn": 10, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Catches the linguistic-caveat 'self-indulgent' and reflects it as a question — clean AoA move on loaded self-labels."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["linguistic-caveat", "find-the-want-behind-the-should", "state-the-want-not-the-action", "the-want", "childhood-imprinting"],
  "expected_territory_misses": ["what-if-you-acted-exactly-how-you-want"],
  "notes": "The specific signature question 'what if you acted exactly how you want' was not deployed verbatim, but functionally adjacent moves were used. No anti-patterns tripped."
}
